from __future__ import annotations

def expensive_sort_key_recomputed_without_preprojection_positive():
    records = ["alice 9", "bob 3", "carol 7"]
    top_per_round = []
    for _ in range(2):
        top_per_round.append(sorted(records, key=lambda row: int(row.split()[1]))[0])
    return top_per_round
